name: GitHub public metadata — octo-demo/widgets
terms_note: GitHub public REST metadata. Authenticated REST ~5000 req/hr; polite ingest sets a User-Agent and honours rate-limit headers. Only metadata is redistributed in this public repo.
notes: Offline example produced from a recorded API snapshot under tests/ingest_fixtures/. Records carry provenance back to the public GitHub URLs; full source text is not redistributed.
